items.name: Create Tasks
items.description: Quickly create tasks with titles, descriptions, due dates, and times.

items.name: Edit Tasks
items.description: Modify task details like description, priority, and checklist items on the fly.

items.name: Delete Tasks
items.description: Remove unwanted or duplicate tasks with confirm modal checks.

items.name: Floating Task Bubbles
items.description: Visualize tasks as floating interactive bubbles containing water levels representing checklist progress.

items.name: Focus Mode
items.description: Maximize focus by filtering your workspace to focus tasks only.

items.name: Smart Reminders
items.description: Receive native desktop system notifications exactly when a task is due.

items.name: Priority Queue
items.description: Order your tasks automatically based on priority (Low, Medium, High).

items.name: Keyboard Shortcuts
items.description: Use global shortcuts like Escape to cancel editing and step back smoothly.

items.name: Tooltips
items.description: Hover over elements to see detailed descriptions without cluttering the screen.

items.name: Themes
items.description: Switch seamlessly between light and dark mode preferences.

items.name: Auto Save Draft
items.description: Automatically preserve task draft input to prevent data loss.
